creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
diff -ruN p5-Proc-ProcessTable.orig/Makefile p5-Proc-ProcessTable/Makefile
--- p5-Proc-ProcessTable.orig/Makefile	Tue Oct  9 03:33:39 2001
+++ p5-Proc-ProcessTable/Makefile	Tue Oct  9 03:34:01 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Proc-ProcessTable
-PORTVERSION=	0.31
+PORTVERSION=	0.32
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Proc
diff -ruN p5-Proc-ProcessTable.orig/distinfo p5-Proc-ProcessTable/distinfo
--- p5-Proc-ProcessTable.orig/distinfo	Tue Oct  9 03:33:39 2001
+++ p5-Proc-ProcessTable/distinfo	Tue Oct  9 03:34:07 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (Proc-ProcessTable-0.31.tar.gz) = 511ce5719bbc687c8491fe5c8d806412
+MD5 (Proc-ProcessTable-0.32.tar.gz) = e9d6fe4a8a019b2ebfc9eedaca2a9a66
